title: U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense, Pentagon assessments show
summary_full: Amid hostilities with Iran, the American military expended far more advanced interceptors to protect Israel than Israeli forces did, according to Defense Department data.
summary_public: Amid hostilities with Iran, the American military expended far more advanced interceptors to protect Israel than Israeli forces did, according to Defense Department data.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense
